subject: Fermi GBM trigger 477460274/160218161 is not a GRB
body:
H.-F. Yu (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 477460274/160218161
at 03:51:10.08 UT on 18 February 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB.

This trigger is due to particle activity."
